title: chrysanthemum aureoglobosum
intro: Chrysanthemum aureoglobosum, also known as Golden Globe Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, headache, and sore throat. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum aureoglobosum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Chrysanthemum aureoglobosum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
